name: TASK CONSUMER PRODUCTS LIMITED
description: Task Consumer Products is a major player in the tissue sector, having established a strong manufacturing capacity that supports its production of toilet tissue.

name: Toilet Paper Man
description: Toilet Paper Man specializes in providing a wide range of toilet paper products, from quality 3-ply options to 1-ply jumbo rolls, catering to various needs since 1998. Their commitment to quality and service makes them a reliable source for essential cleaning and paper products.

name: Elite Professional Ecuador
description: Elite Profesional, a brand of PROTISA ECUADOR, specializes in eco-friendly paper products, including a variety of tissue paper items. They offer high-quality toilet paper, specifically the TP JUMBO 1H BLANCA 300 MTS X 2, designed to meet stringent hygiene standards for various markets.

name: Kimberly-Clark Professional
description: The company offers a variety of products, including commercial toilet paper, aimed at creating hygienic and safe environments. Their commitment to quality ensures that guests experience comfort while maintaining cleanliness.

name: Elite Professional Colombia
description: Elite Professional, a part of the CMPC group, specializes in high-quality paper products, including toilet paper. They offer tailored hygienic solutions for various sectors, ensuring that their products meet specific market needs and client budgets.

name: International Paper
description: International Paper is a prominent global manufacturer that produces pulp for tissue products, including toilet paper. The company's commitment to sustainable practices ensures innovative and renewable fiber-based solutions.

name: Fine Hygienic Holding
description: Fine Hygienic Holding is a manufacturer of high-quality toilet tissue, utilizing innovative technologies like WetPro™ for durable, flushable options. With a commitment to hygiene and sustainability, the company meets diverse consumer needs in the hygienic paper product market.

name: Focus Egypt
description: Hayat Kimya's Focus brand specializes in providing a diverse range of tissue products, including various types of toilet paper, to professional users such as hotels and hospitals. With a strong presence in the FMCG sector and a commitment to quality and innovation, Focus has established itself as a leading supplier in the market.

name: Essity
description: Essity is a leading global hygiene and health company that offers a diverse range of products, including consumer tissue, which encompasses toilet paper. Their commitment to innovative and sustainable solutions highlights the importance of hygiene and well-being for individuals throughout their lives.

name: Who Gives a Crap
description: The company, Who Gives A Crap, offers eco-friendly toilet paper and proudly donates 50% of its profits to improve sanitation in the developing world. Their commitment to sustainable practices and social impact makes their toilet paper not just a bathroom essential but also a means to make a positive difference.
